title: hibiscus papilionaceus
intro: Hibiscus papilionaceus, also known as the orhabil or 'crash' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, due to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hibiscus papilionaceus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as a natural diuretic. Hibiscus papilionaceus is often used to make herbal teas, extracts, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
